name: Jalapeno-Stuffed Steaks
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Trimmed filet of beef, cut
10 Jalapeno chiles, stems and removed -- chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the jalapeno chiles, onion, and garlic in oil until soft but still crisp. Remove from heat and mix in the grated cheese.
2. Refrigerate the stuffing mixture for at least one day before using it.
3. Slice into the steaks from the edge to create a pocket for the stuffing.
4. Stuff each steak with the jalapeno mixture, securing any openings with a toothpick if needed.
5. Season the outside of each steak with freshly ground black pepper.
6. Grill over hot charcoal until reaching desired doneness.
